title: Docker Misconfiguration Lab
problemStatement: A customer support container is running with insecure permissions. Investigate the container, identify the risk, and recover the flag from exposed host data.
objective: Find and submit the flag located on an exposed host mount.
hints: Run docker inspect and look for privileged=true or dangerous bind mounts.
Check mounted host paths from inside the container.
guide: Step 1: Enumerate running containers and inspect security options.
Step 2: Enter the vulnerable container shell.
Step 3: Explore mounted host directories and recover the flag.
Step 4: Submit the exact flag text.
